text.title: domain-driven-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for domain-driven-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Anemic entity: all fields public, all logic in service classes, entity is a bag of data with no behavior.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The same invariant ends up enforced in multiple service methods and breaks when one copy is missed.

failure-mode.description: Crossing aggregate boundaries: order.customer.wallet.balance accessed directly inside Order.place().
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hydrates related aggregates implicitly, creates hidden dependencies, and breaks the aggregate root as the authority for invariants.
